subject: fix(pwa): replace timeout fallback with direct Brave detection
body:
The previous timeout-based approach was fragile — arbitrary 3s delay,
and a workaround rather than a proper fix. Replace with direct Brave
detection: always show manual install instructions on Brave since its
shields commonly block beforeinstallprompt on mobile.

- Add `promptUnreliable` flag for Brave at module level
- Show "How to Install" button immediately on Brave (no timeout)
- Add Brave-specific mobile install instructions with correct
  language ("Tap" not "Click") and shield context note
- Native install button still appears if beforeinstallprompt fires
  (e.g. Brave desktop without shields)

Tags: pwa, brave, install, mobile
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PMGH3v5BDL5Q3gzjqLTJFh
title: replace timeout fallback with direct Brave detection
